subject: Special Offer: Try a Times Digital Subscription for just $5 for 12 Weeks
body:
Take Advantage of this Special Offer -- $5 For Your First 12 Weeks
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTR70lB81HXJB85XlVAAwENc2N/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTR70lB81HXJB85XlVAAwENc2N/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

TRY THE TIMES DIGITAL EXPERIENCE PLUS
THE NEW FREE NYT NOW APP

$5 FOR YOUR FIRST 12 WEEKS

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTR70lB81HXJB85XlVAAwENc2N/sub2

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

The New York Times satisfies your need to know by connecting you to 
award-winning journalism, fresh perspectives and innovative multimedia; 
anytime, anywhere. Now, try unlimited access to all this and more: 
just $5 for your first 12 weeks.*

>From spring recipes to breaking news from around the world, 
keep up with all the latest on your computer, smartphone or 
tablet. With a Times Digital Subscription, you no longer have 
to limit yourself to 10 articles a month. Plus, enjoy even more 
free benefits with your subscription — like the new NYT Now 
iPhone(R) app which gives you quick access to top news stories 
(a $96 yearly value). 

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL OFFER

This offer is only available to select NYTimes.com readers. 
Try unlimited digital access to The New York Times for just 
$5 for your first 12 weeks, and see why The Times experience 
keeps you informed and inspired, everywhere life takes you. 

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTR70lB81HXJB85XlVAAwENc2N/sub3

*****

$5 FOR YOUR FIRST 12 WEEKS

-- Unlimited access to NYTimes.com

-- Access to the Times smartphone and tablet apps

-- The new NYT Now app 

-- What We're Reading email

-- Today's Paper web app

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTR70lB81HXJB85XlVAAwENc2N/sub4

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

*Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times 
digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, 
Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile 
apps are not supported on all devices. You will be billed $5 for 
the first 12 weeks up front which is nonrefundable. After the first 
12 weeks, all subscriptions will automatically renew and your credit 
card or PayPal account will be charged in advance of each four-week 
billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is canceled, 
refunds and termination of access will follow the Terms of Sale 
policy. Prices are in U.S. dollars and are subject to change. Other 
restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please add 
nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTR70lB81HXJB85XlVAAwENc2N/nyt

The New York Times satisfies your need to know by connecting you to award-winning journalism, fresh perspectives and innovative multimedia; anytime, anywhere. Now, try unlimited access to all this and more: just $5 for your first 12 weeks.*

>From spring recipes to breaking news from around the world, keep up with all the latest on your computer, smartphone or tablet. With a Times Digital Subscription, you no longer have to limit yourself to 10 articles a month. Plus, enjoy even more free benefits with your subscription — like the new NYT Now iPhone® app which gives you quick access to top news stories (a $96 yearly value).

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS SPECIAL OFFER

This offer is only available to select NYTimes.com readers. Try unlimited digital access to The New York Times for just $5 for your first 12 weeks, and see why The Times experience keeps you informed and inspired, everywhere life takes you.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

JUST $5 FOR YOUR FIRST 12 WEEKS

With a Times Digital Subscription, you get unlimited access to 
thought-provoking features, opinion and multimedia so you stay 
fully informed. 

Be a part of our influential audience of Times readers that stays 
up to the minute with the most relevant news from around the globe, 
24 hours a day. See developments unfold at home or on the go, with 
full access to NYTimes.com and our award-winning smartphone and 
tablet apps. 

So go beyond 10 articles each month. Unlock your Times access right 
now and stay on top of all the latest news.

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTGGpKB81HXJB84oF5AAwENckw/sub02

-- Award-winning journalism

world's finest journalism. Get personalized recommendations to 
stay fully informed about topics that matter most to you.
